facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 635 reviews. On a street tourists scroll past without stopping.

Buổi Sáng 부이상 on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is putting up numbers that most restaurants in Phu Quoc can't touch. Vietnamese food done right, rated by people who actually ate there.

635 opinions don't land at 4.8 by accident. Find it at 128 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Khu Phố 7.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 635 reviews. 4.8 stars. Watch what comes out of this kitchen at Buổi Sáng 부이상 and you'll understand why. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is hiding one of Phu Quoc's best-rated Vietnamese spots. Tag your travel buddy.
